title: Morning check: memory hygiene + snapshot gap

activities.note: Scanned for redundant bullets and outdated items
Wrote a quick hourly snapshot manually (09:00)
Nonstandard commit message; realized after push

decisions: Start including session_id references in daily memory entries for traceability.
Keep bullets concise (single clause) and deduplicate before writing.
mistakes: Nearly duplicated a 'dedupe before write' rule in MEMORY.md; removed the duplicate.
Used a nonstandard commit message instead of 'compound: daily review YYYY-MM-DD'.
gotchas: Hourly snapshots are not automated; manual notes risk being forgotten.
preferences_observed: User prefers concise bullets over paragraphs.
Avoid copying raw logs into memory; synthesize instead.
todos: Propose enabling automated hourly snapshots via cron or heartbeat.
outcomes: Confirmed need for commit message standardization.
Identified lack of hourly snapshot automation.

title: Afternoon: dedupe pass + cron investigation

activities.note: Job did not execute; PATH issue suspected

decisions: Use full binary path in cron entries to avoid PATH mismatch.
Standardize commit messages to 'compound: daily review YYYY-MM-DD'.
mistakes: Ran hourly cron without full path; job never fired.
Committed a review with a nonstandard message again.
gotchas: Cron jobs often fail silently when PATH is not set; must use absolute paths.
preferences_observed: User wants 'Gotchas' to include a short root cause, not just the symptom.
todos: Document the full cron line in AGENTS.md with absolute path to clawdbot.
Retrofit previous day's memory with session references where missing (low priority).
outcomes: Confirmed dedupe script works for exact string duplicates.

title: Evening: nightly review dry run + workflow proposal

activities.note: Prepared Workflow Changes section to propose two updates

decisions: Enable hourly snapshots at the top of the hour using absolute path.
Adopt and enforce commit message pattern 'compound: daily review YYYY-MM-DD' for all memory updates starting today.
gotchas: When memory file path is wrong, review appends to a new file; verify 'memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md' exactly.
preferences_observed: Keep 'Open Items' checkboxes minimal and concrete.
todos: Append 'Workflow Changes' proposal to AGENTS.md with the cron line and commit message standard.
Perform the actual nightly review after 22:30 run completes.
outcomes: Ready to submit workflow changes and proceed with scheduled automation.
